rent.note: furnished 1BR in Green Point/Sea Point nomad area; R17,000/mo (~$935) or R13,000 ($715); midpoint; peak Jan-Mar higher

utilities.note: electric + water + internet; load-shedding sometimes requires generator/inverter costs

groceries.note: Woolworths/Pick n Pay/Checkers; Cape Town food scene excellent; $180-250/mo range

diningOut.note: cheap restaurants and groceries but top food scene; $8-15 sit-down lunch; cafes $3-5

transit.note: Uber + MyCiTi bus; Cape Town requires transport; $60-100/mo realistic

coworking.note: Ideas Cartel R2,000/mo (~$110); Cape Town Office dedicated desk R4,500 ex VAT; hot desk ~R1,090

misc.note: hiking (free), beaches, vineyards, gym, entertainment, personal care, buffer

accomSeasonality._doc: 12 monthly multipliers applied to RENT ONLY (Jan..Dec). 1.0 = base. Raise for peak tourist/weather months, lower for off-peak.

evidence.claim: Cape Town Green Point furnished 1BR R17,000/mo (~$935); shared room from R13,000 ($715)
evidence.quote: A 1-bedroom fully furnished apartment in Green Point is available for R17,000 per month. A fully furnished room in a shared apartment in Green Point is available from January 1 to July 1, 2026, for R13,000 per month

evidence.claim: Cape Town nomad plan ~$1,332/month; single person costs $2,092
evidence.quote: A digital nomad should plan for approximately $1,332/month in Cape Town, covering coworking, accommodation, food, and local transport. A single person costs $2,092 per month

evidence.claim: Ideas Cartel coworking R2,000/month; Cape Town Office dedicated desk R4,500 ex VAT; entry R1,090/mo
evidence.quote: Ideas Cartel offers monthly coworking memberships at R2,000/month (ex. VAT). Cape Town Office offers a Dedicated Desk plan at R4,500 ex VAT. you can expect to pay around R1,090 per month for entry-level access

evidence.claim: Green Point and Sea Point best for nomads; fast WiFi, safety, cafes nearby
evidence.quote: Green Point and Sea Point are the top choices for digital nomads, offering fast Wi-Fi, safety, and easy access to cafés and coworking spaces
